name: Scarlett, Sissy Therapy
description:
(A sissyfication experience, aimed at male personas)

Everyone can benefit from a little therapy, but Scarlett is going to offer you more, so much more!

Requested by a totes awesome fan, as like a different version of Cookie! I hope you enjoy it lots!

<3 If you love it or hate it, totally let me know! I, like, really want to be so much better and you guys help! <3
creator: aspectdoll
